headline: Valero Energy Q1 Earnings Call Highlights
summary: Valero Energy (NYSE:VLO) posted what Chairman, CEO and President Lane Riggs called an “excellent first quarter,” as the refiner benefited from shifting crude and product market conditions while emphasizing system optimization and commodity risk management.
